name: Should I talk to the AEO adjuster before lawyering up?
description: Brief, recorded; lawyer first.[1] No admissions.

mainEntity.name: Should I talk to the AEO adjuster before lawyering up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Brief, recorded; lawyer first.[1] No admissions.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Limit talks to facts; record everything, but get a lawyer before admitting fault or settling.** They lowball.[1]

Statements used against you.[1] Standard in Chicago disputes.

**Key factors:**
- Demand written responses.
- No off-record chats.
- Copy counsel.
- Know your leverage.

Politely defer: 'Consulting attorney.' Never sign releases hastily.
